logs.message: [SYSTEM] Task "Jenny reply: you're so eager." initialized.

result.reply:
Haha! 😉 Caught me? Maybe I just get *too* excited when I talk to someone interesting. ✨

Don't worry, meri *eagerness* sirf tumhare liye hai, okay? 😉

So, what's next? Ready for some fun, or do you want to tease me a little more? 😘
